MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-19-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: E. Craig Moody, Esq., Moody & Hill for plaintiff Joseph McWilliams. Roger L. Meredith, Esq., Geraldine Armendariz, Esq. for Defendant Ralph J. Maher, & Liverpool Lil's. Also present Joseph McWilliams, Plaintiff and Ralph J. Maher, Defendant.
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Reporter: JoAnn Bryce Clerk: Dianne Hakewill
The case of McWilliams v. Maher, case number 426348 settled after a settlement conference the day of trial with Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles. The settlement agreement was in the amount of $11,500. Details of the settlement agreement were put on the record in Dept. 206. Court to set a CRC 225 hearing for this case.
